title: M&A in Mining: Financing Trends, Opportunities and the Road Ahead
content:
## M&A in Mining: Financing Trends, Opportunities and the Road Ahead
Presented at the 2025 Resourcing Tomorrow Conference in London, UK
Shea Small moderated a keynote panel that explored the latest trends in M&A financing and strategic partnerships in the mining sector. The discussion brought together industry leaders from Xanadu Mines, Resource Capital Funds, Elemental Royalty Corp., Hudbay Minerals, and Rothschild & Co. Together, they shared insights on the shifting dynamics of deal-making, capital flows, and opportunities shaping the future of mining.
- Shea T. Small Partner | Co-Head of M&A | Co-leader Global Metals & Mining People.Offices.Plural Toronto, London, UK
